title: Navier-Stokes 2D vs 3D Dimensional Threshold v2

analysis.object: T462: Navier-Stokes 2D vs 3D Dimensional Threshold v2 depth analysis

2d_inverse_cascade.description: 2D: inverse cascade pushes energy to large scales

3d_direct_cascade.description: 3D: direct cascade to small scales; vortex stretching amplifies

dimension_2_vs_3.description: Dimension 2: no vortex stretching → EML-3 proof; dimension 3: stretching → EML-inf

dim_4_harder.description: Dimension 4+: even harder; EML-inf more severe

dimensional_argument.description: T462: 2D NS is EML-3; 3D is the dimensional EML-inf threshold due to vortex stretching

threshold_law.description: T462: dimension 3 is the EML-inf threshold; the dimensional jump 2D→3D adds vortex stretching = EML-3→EML-inf

analysis.theorem: T462: Navier-Stokes 2D vs 3D Dimensional Threshold v2 (S741).

key_theorem: T462: Navier-Stokes 2D vs 3D Dimensional Threshold v2 (S741).
